name: io.github.mrnaqa/sourceweave-web-search
description: MCP server and CLI for web search and page reading with SearXNG, Crawl4AI, and Redis.
title: SourceWeave Web Search

environmentVariables.name: SOURCEWEAVE_SEARCH_CRAWL4AI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the Crawl4AI service.

environmentVariables.name: SOURCEWEAVE_SEARCH_CACHE_REDIS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Redis or Valkey URL used for caching.

runtimeArguments.name: -p
runtimeArguments.description: Map the local MCP HTTP port to the container.

port.description: Local port to expose the MCP server on.

searxng_url.description: Full SearXNG URL template used by SourceWeave.

runtimeArguments.name: -e
runtimeArguments.description: Base URL for the Crawl4AI service.

crawl4ai_url.description: Base URL for the Crawl4AI service.

runtimeArguments.name: -e
runtimeArguments.description: Redis or Valkey URL used for caching.

redis_url.description: Redis or Valkey URL used for caching.
